name: Pelham Nightstand White - Threshold™
description:
The Pelham Nightstand White from Threshold is both modern and functional. This space-saving bedside table gives you three full-size drawers, all perfect for storing the odds and ends of your life out of sight. Use the sturdy profiled top to pile on your books, cell phone, alarm clock, lamp and whatever else you like; this nightstand can take it with style to spare. It's built with a strong wood frame for durability and long-lasting use.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.
